validations.name: input_inventory_completeness
validations.evidence: All 9 file-based mandatory inputs present and readable. Pie vault directories confirmed containing .md files. SHA-256 checksums recorded for all inputs at time of read. No missing inputs. FC-001 not triggered.

validations.name: schema_validation_signal_registry
validations.evidence: signal_registry.json contains 'signals' array with 5 entries. Each entry carries: signal_id, statement, domain_id, capability_id, component_ids, source_refs. All required fields present per reproducibility_contract.md R-2.

validations.name: schema_validation_evidence_mapping_index
validations.evidence: evidence_mapping_index.json contains 'signals' array with 5 entries. Each entry carries: signal_id, source_object_id, semantic_anchor (domain_id, capability_id, component_ids), evidence_chain, temporal_reference. All required fields present per reproducibility_contract.md R-2.

validations.name: binding_candidate_resolution
validations.evidence: 5 binding candidates resolved — one per signal. Each mapped to capability-level node via semantic_anchor.capability_id. Exact filename stem match against pie_vault/02_Capabilities/: CAP-02→C_02_Network_Security_Intelligence_Collection, CAP-27→C_27_Caching_Layer, CAP-30→C_30_Domain_Event_Bus, CAP-29→C_29_Platform_Monorepo_Container, CAP-40→C_40_Delivery_and_Quality_Infrastructure. No inference. FC-008 not triggered.

validations.name: structure_validity_all_records
validations.evidence: Rule 43.3-SV-001 PASS for all 5 records. node_reference present in all records. All 5 node_ids resolve exactly to governed topology entries in pie_vault/02_Capabilities/. FC-002 not triggered.

validations.name: signal_integrity_all_records
validations.evidence: Rule 43.3-SI-001 PASS for all 5 records. All signal_ids confirmed present in signal_registry.json. All signal states carried from upstream 40.x source objects (computed, blocked, evaluable, partial). No signal computed within 43.x. FC-002 not triggered.

validations.name: evidence_completeness_all_records
validations.evidence: Rule 43.3-EC-001 PASS for all 5 records. All evidence_embedding fields present and non-null: association_basis, provenance_chain, source_reference, temporal_reference. Provenance chain carried verbatim from evidence_mapping_index.json. FC-003, FC-004, FC-005, FC-009 not triggered.

validations.name: derivation_compliance_all_records
validations.evidence: Rule 43.3-DC-001 PASS for all 5 records. No SSZ or SSI in any field. No derived signals. No computed metrics. All signal content carried from upstream only. FC-002 not triggered.

validations.name: boundary_compliance_all_records
validations.evidence: Rule 43.3-BC-001 PASS for all 5 records. No interpretation content. No narrative constructs. No inferred meaning. No aggregation or fusion. No rendering instructions. FC-002 not triggered.

validations.name: per_record_checksums
validations.evidence: SHA-256 recomputed for each of the 5 records (canonical JSON, sort_keys, no whitespace, excluding checksum field). All 5 recomputed checksums match stored checksums exactly. FC-006 not triggered. Checksums: BIND-SIG-001=58555a38..., BIND-SIG-002=f7d1e64c..., BIND-SIG-003=b8127f20..., BIND-SIG-004=89d3ee36..., BIND-SIG-005=4b27e1e8...

validations.name: artifact_level_checksum
validations.evidence: Artifact-level SHA-256 recomputed on full records array. Recomputed matches stored artifact_checksum exactly: 25c2e9dc04dd6f06dacf4a6f973b6b2306c15067aa9e5d09a24b9d4783009f69. FC-006 not triggered.

validations.name: deterministic_ordering
validations.evidence: Records sorted lexicographically by binding_id confirmed. Actual order: BIND-SIG-001-C_02_..., BIND-SIG-002-C_27_..., BIND-SIG-003-C_30_..., BIND-SIG-004-C_29_..., BIND-SIG-005-C_40_... matches lexicographic sort. FC-007 not triggered.

validations.name: contract_version_all_records
validations.evidence: All 5 records carry contract_version: 43.31-v1. Artifact envelope carries contract_version: 43.31-v1. FC-012 not triggered.

validations.name: validation_status_all_valid
validations.evidence: All 5 records carry validation_status: VALID. stats.valid_count=5, stats.invalid_count=0, stats.total_count=5. FC-011 not triggered.

validations.name: canonical_artifact_present_at_path
validations.evidence: docs/pios/43.3/validated_binding_payload.json exists, readable, passes all schema and checksum checks. Artifact is the canonical and only output of this stream.
